calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for Susan Wong.

Mr. Sarreshtehdary stated that he is not aware of any objection, that he has no new information, that the drafting Attorney does not hold the original will and that he believes his office only has a copy of the Trust. The Court stated that the lost will is a pour-over will that relates to the Trust instrument. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
